title: ECHS Hisar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Medical Officer and Non Medical Staffs Posts
post_name: Medical Officer and Non Medical Staffs
short_info: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially announced the Medical Officer and Non Medical Staffs Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published at ECHS Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 66 years for Medical Officer and maximum 53/56 years for other posts and hold qualifications such as MBBS, Graduate, Class I Clerical Trade, 10+2 with Science, or Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic Course can now submit their offline applications up to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply off

age_limit.age_details: Max age 66 years for Medical Officer, Max age 53/56 years for others
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Medical Officer is 66 years. Maximum age limit for other posts is 53/56 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (Min 03 Years experience after internship), Graduate/Class I Clerical trade (Armed Forces) (Min 05 Yrs experience for civil candidates), Dental Technician (10+2 with Science + two years Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic Course), Dental Hygienist/ Assistant Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class-I DH/Dora Course (Armed Forces) (Min 05 years experience)
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS with a minimum of 03 years of experience after internship. Data Operator Entry: Graduate or Class I Clerical trade (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of experience for civil candidates. Dental A/T/H: Should have passed 10+2 with Science or equivalent from a recognized Board or institution, and possess a two-year Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic Course registered with Central/State Government or Dental Council of India. For Dental Hygienist/Assistant, a Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class-I DH/Dora Course (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of experience is required. DEO/CIK (CTS Fund): Graduate or Class I Clerical trade (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of experience for civil candidates.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Hisar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
